chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Ist Appeal No. 37 of 2012 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 17.10.2023 None present for the appellant. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Advocate for the respondent............. We have perused the last four order sheets wherein no one was in attendance on behalf of the appellant. It was noted on 15.09.2020 as well as on the following dates viz. 17.02.2022, 14.11.2022 and 21.12.2022 that counsel for the appellant or of its representative are called absent, which shows that appellant lost interest in the proceedings. Accordingly the appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E
